Telemetry.//PublicEventsDelaySeconds: Public /api/v0/telemetry/events exposure delay in seconds; feed serves only events at least this old. 0 = live (no delay) — current setting for dev/build. For public/unauthed exposure set a delay (e.g. 30) per the aggregated-or-delayed privacy rule. Env: Telemetry__PublicEventsDelaySeconds.
